_comment: Neutral example config for the claim-chart generator. Replace every placeholder with case-specific values before use.
claimElements: 1. An autonomous vehicle (AV) control system comprising:
a) a communication module receiving vehicle-specific control instructions from one or more external infrastructure devices; and
b) a vehicle control module controlling a vehicle according to said vehicle-specific control instructions,
wherein said vehicle-specific control instructions comprise instructions for vehicle position, speed, steering, or control.
mappingData: ExampleCo's route, speed, steering, and control instructions

introText: ExampleCo's autonomous vehicle platform integrates perception, planning, communications, and control functions that allow a vehicle to operate according to system-generated driving instructions.
ExampleCo materials describe an onboard computing system that receives information from external infrastructure and uses that information with vehicle state data to generate driving-control outputs.

herein.post: , which integrates communication, planning, and vehicle-control functionality.
